stories.headline: We've been speaking to Iranians during one week of war. Here's what they said
stories.description: Ordinary Iranians reflect on seven days of conflict and where they see their country going next.

stories.headline: Hezbollah, Israeli troops clash on the ground in eastern Lebanon’s Bekaa
stories.description: Lebanese Health Ministry says at least 12 people killed, 33 wounded in Israeli air raids on the town of Nabi Chit.

stories.headline: Iranian missiles intercepted over Saudi, Jordan, drones launched at Qatar
stories.description: Qatar says it came under a wave of drone attacks, with 10 fired from Iran, nine intercepted.

stories.headline: Oil and gas prices surge as Iran war expands
stories.description: Oil prices surge past $90 after the U.S. and Israel attacked Iran, escalating Middle East war.

stories.headline: Newspaper headlines: 'Trump demands Iran's surrender' and 'UK voters say no to joining war'
stories.description: The conflict in the Middle East continues to lead today's papers as the US calls for Iran's "unconditional surrender".
